title: Unicorn Play Color Dough Sets for Kids Ages 4-5, 36 PCS Dough Tools Kit for Toddlers Ages 3+, Unicorn Hair Salon Pretend Play Toys for Girls Birthday Gifts
features: 🌈Cute Dough Play Set for Kids: The unicorn dough playset is colorful and cute, you will get 36pcs dough accessories including 1 unicorn, 5 unicorn moulds,1 pair of wings, 3 hair molds, 3 saddle molds, 1base, 1scissor, 1 tool knife, 1pattern card and 16 dough in 8 different colors. Children can make their own unicorns with all the accessories.

✨Natural Materials: The Unicorn Colored Dough Set is carefully made with natural materials such as wheat flour, water and salt, which is safe and non-toxic. The doughs are soft and pliable, easy to mold, ensuring a long-lasting entertainment for your kids age 3-8 years old. Also, all the molds are made from ABS plastic with smooth edges care for little hands.

🦄Unleash the Magic of Unicorns: Brace yourselves for a journey into the enchanting realm of unicorn wonders! Watch as your girls imagination comes to life as they mold and shape their very own unicorn creations. Whether they're sculpting an unicorn clan, adorning a unicorn palace, or fashioning vibrant unicorns with flowing rainbow manes, our captivating unicorn dough sets promise boundless hours of amusement and an outlet for their limitless imagination.

❤️ Ignite the Flames of Creativity and Fantasy: Unicorns embody the essence of magic and fantasy. As your children immerse themselves in the captivating world of our dough tool sets, they'll embark on a thrilling adventure of crafting their own extraordinary storylines and unlocking the depths of their creativity. And the fun doesn't stop there! These sets are the epitome of wholesome family entertainment, serving as the perfect catalyst for interactive playtime with siblings, friends, parents, or even grandparents.

🎁 Perfect Gift for Kids Toddlers:The unicorn dough set is perfect as a gift for children.Whether it's a birthdays, Easter, Christmas stocking stuffer or just a special surprise, this dough set make a fantastic gift for unicorn enthusiasts of all ages. Perfect birthday gifts for 3 4 5 6 7 8 years old girls boys. Watch as their eyes light up with joy and wonder!
